title: Bounded Systems token-bundle manifest
description: The contract for a deployed brand token bundle. Canonical source is the DTCG tokens.json; the manifest declares every format projection with its media type and content hash, so a consumer can fetch, verify, and pick a format without guessing the layout. Content-addressed: integrity over freshness.

name.description: Package the bundle is cut from.

version.description: SemVer of the brand package this bundle was built from.

commit.description: Git commit the bundle was built from, when known (provenance).

spec.description: The standard the canonical source conforms to.

ref.description: The spec the source conforms to.

source.description: The canonical artifact path within the bundle.

artifacts.description: Every published projection. Each is independently fetchable and verifiable.

path.description: Path relative to the bundle root.

mediaType.description: IANA media type served at this path.

format.description: Logical format key (dtcg, css-variables, scss, js, json-flat, swift, android-xml).

sha256.description: SHA-256 of the file bytes — the integrity contract.
